channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18330] interop: sanity-pcc test_35: FAIL: Setup PCC backend /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc on /mnt/lustre failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b632e06e-abc9-41c6-89f3-f72b65d0c885

test_35 failed with the following error:

CMD: trevis-103vm11 file /tmp/f35.sanity-pcc
/tmp/f35.sanity-pcc: Linux rev 1.0 ext4 filesystem data, UUID=baebff59-697c-4562-b53a-bd645bc6e382 (extents) (64bit) (large files) (huge files)
CMD: trevis-103vm11 mount -t ext4 -o loop,usrquota,grpquota /tmp/f35.sanity-pcc /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc
CMD: trevis-103vm11 mkdir -p /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc
Starting copytool 'agt1' on 'trevis-103vm11' with cmdline 'lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --archive 2  "/mnt/lustre"'
CMD: trevis-103vm11 lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --archive 2  "/mnt/lustre" < /dev/null > "/autotest/autotest-1/2024-10-03/lustre-reviews_full-dne-part-2_108128_1002_80999c16-58df-43f3-adcb-708b5e018930//sanity-pcc.test_35.copytool2_log.trevis-103vm11.log" 2>&1
CMD: trevis-103vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl pcc add /mnt/lustre /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc -p projid={100}\ rwid=2
trevis-103vm11: lctl pcc pcc: error: setting llite.lustre-ffff8ca04544d800.pcc='add /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc projid={100} rwid=2': Operation not supported (95)
pdsh@trevis-103vm10: trevis-103vm11: ssh exited with exit code 95
 sanity-pcc test_35: @@@@@@ FAIL: Setup PCC backend /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc on /mnt/lustre failed

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-pcc test_35 - Setup PCC backend /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc on /mnt/lustre failed
item.summary: interop: sanity-pcc test_35: FAIL: Setup PCC backend /mnt/pcc.d35.sanity-pcc/d35.sanity-pcc on /mnt/lustre failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56675/
Subject: LU-18330 tests: add interop PCCRO check for sanity-pcc/test_35
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 8ed22b88a46197a91d62c435a74577864cb66ce7
The patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56675 is ready to land.

"Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56689
Subject: LU-18330 tests: debug code for detach with unknown reason
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 4bd9177365ad758a3e7c446c4f4fb5a48520ebeb

"Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56675
Subject: LU-18330 tests: add interop PCCRO check for sanity-pcc/test_35
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 06510e8120e29ded38973d0fe4a180400d679f60

Hi qian_wc,
Could you please investigate this interop failure?

The failure occurred consistently in the following 2.16.0 clients with 2.15.5 servers interop test sessions:
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_el9.4-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_sles15sp6-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
lustre-reviews_el8.10-x86_64_ubuntu2404-x86_64_full-dne-part-1
sanity-pcc test 36a hit the same failure: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b632e06e-abc9-41c6-89f3-f72b65d0c885
